manager.name: ComfyUI-Manager
manager.reason: CLI and UI management for custom node installation, updates, snapshots, and dependency fixes.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-EasyOCR
nodes.reason: Detect text and produce OCR masks for text/watermark removal workflows. Uses the fork with robust OCR box handling and sensitivity presets.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-qwenmultiangle
nodes.reason: Adds Qwen multi-angle camera prompt controls. Uses the fork and is always dependency-checked by the installer.

nodes.name: comfyui-flux2fun-controlnet
nodes.reason: Provides Flux2FunControlNetLoader and Flux2FunControlNetApply for the FLUX.2-dev Alibaba Fun ControlNet Union (pose/canny/depth/etc) used by the pose-controlnet + reference paint workflow. Uses the fork with ComfyUI Flux timestep_zero_index compatibility. Requires the FLUX.2-dev base model.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-enricos-nodes
nodes.reason: Provides an interactive compositor for Photoshop-like layer placement, scale, rotation, stretch, and transformed mask outputs for foundation layout workflows. Uses the fork with compositor fixes used by the VN foundation layout workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Watermark-Detection
nodes.reason: YOLO watermark detector that outputs a binary mask for watermark removal workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI_essentials
nodes.reason: Provides MaskBoundingBox+ for padded bbox crops around detected OCR masks.

nodes.name: was-node-suite-comfyui
nodes.reason: Provides Masks Combine Batch to union EasyOCR's batched text masks.

nodes.name: comfyui-fast-mosaic-detector
nodes.reason: Detects mosaic/pixel-block regions and outputs a binary mask for auto mosaic inpaint workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Olm-DragCrop
nodes.reason: Adds an interactive drag-crop image node for explicit manual box selection in workflows.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Pack
nodes.reason: Provides YOLO/SAM face mask utilities such as BboxDetectorForEach, SAMLoader, SAMDetectorCombined, SegsToCombinedMask, ImpactDilateMask, and mask conversion helpers.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Subpack
nodes.reason: Provides UltralyticsDetectorProvider for YOLO face detection used to generate automatic face masks.

nodes.name: comfyui_face_parsing
nodes.reason: Provides face parsing and bbox crop nodes for tight face-only masks that exclude hair, neck, clothing, and background.

nodes.name: Comfyui-LayerForge
nodes.reason: Provides LayerForgeNode, an interactive layered canvas editor for testing manual environment and placement-mask compositing as a possible replacement for Compositor3.

nodes.name: comfyui_controlnet_aux
nodes.reason: Provides DWPose_Preprocessor (and other ControlNet preprocessors) to turn a photo into an OpenPose skeleton that feeds the Flux2 Fun ControlNet. Pulls onnxruntime + detector/pose model weights on first run.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler
nodes.reason: Generative DiT one-step restoration upscaler. Provides SeedVR2LoadDiTModel, SeedVR2LoadVAEModel, SeedVR2TorchCompileSettings, and SeedVR2VideoUpscaler for the detail/4K refine stage (seedvr2_ema_7b_sharp_fp16 + ema_vae_fp16); DiT/VAE weights auto-download to models/SEEDVR2. CUDA-only, so gated to linux/windows; macOS is skipped (never run there) which keeps the Mac install of other nodes unaffected. requirements.txt force-installed via ALWAYS_FIX_DEPENDENCIES; optional CUDA accelerators are installed best-effort via OPTIONAL_ACCELERATORS (Triton/SageAttention on Linux/Windows, Flash Attention on Linux only).
